claims.evidence_text: in saline conditions, artificial seawater with a molality of 200 mM was used. The genotype used in this study is Sakha-93, an Egyptian bread wheat variety (Triticum aestivum L.) known for its tolerance to saline conditions
claims.claim_summary: Salt-tolerant bread wheat cv. Sakha-93 was grown under saline irrigation of 200 mM artificial seawater.

claims.evidence_text: The temperature was regulated to simulate wheat growing season, and a photo period of 16 h of light and 8 h of darkness was maintained.
claims.claim_summary: Wheat grown under a 16 h light / 8 h dark photoperiod to simulate the growing season.
